person.shortBio: Software engineer owning end-to-end backend systems, including architecture, data, and cloud infrastructure, with 4+ years of experience delivering production-grade platforms. Specialized in Ruby on Rails and NestJS with PostgreSQL, deploying high-availability systems on Azure across mining, invoicing, and enterprise domains.
about: I own and operate production backend systems end-to-end: architecture, database design, API development, cloud infrastructure, CI/CD, and production support. I don't just write code — I make technical decisions and ensure systems run reliably at scale.

My core stack is Ruby on Rails and NestJS with PostgreSQL, deployed on Azure. I've built platforms from scratch, optimized legacy systems for 3× faster response times, and managed zero-downtime data migrations across 50K+ records.

I lead technical execution — defining data models, provisioning cloud resources, setting up deployment pipelines, and triaging production issues. I work autonomously and take full accountability for system health and delivery.
Currently seeking senior backend or full stack roles where I can drive architecture decisions and own critical infrastructure.

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.summary: Own the entire backend stack for a mining traceability SaaS — architecture, database administration, Azure infrastructure, CI/CD, and production support — while maintaining and evolving a legacy Ruby on Rails system.
bullets: Architected and scaled a backend system with 200+ REST endpoints across multiple domains, supporting end-to-end mining operations and digitizing 100% of the gold production lifecycle.
Designed and administered the complete database layer — normalized schemas for lab, weighing, and plant domains — cutting redundant queries by ~40% and enforcing data consistency across all sites.
Owned Azure infrastructure end-to-end: provisioned App Services, PostgreSQL, and CI/CD pipelines with Azure DevOps, achieving automated deployments in <10 min and 99.5% production uptime.
Drove the stabilization of a legacy Rails application, resolving 15+ critical bugs and reducing average response times from 2.5s to <800ms through strategic indexing and query refactoring.
Led a zero-loss data migration of 50K+ records from the legacy system to the new platform, designing validation scripts to ensure full data integrity.
Provided production support, triaging incidents and ensuring operational continuity in business-critical environments.
Owned the full system lifecycle: from requirements gathering through deployment to post-release monitoring.

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.summary: Led full stack development and technical ownership of a legacy Ruby on Rails platform supporting electronic invoicing, inventory, and business reporting.
bullets: Engineered the DIAN electronic invoicing integration, automating a ~2-hour daily manual process and eliminating 95% of data entry errors.
Stabilized and modernized a legacy Ruby on Rails + AngularJS application, reducing production incidents by 60% over 6 months through systematic debugging and architectural improvements.
Designed and deployed a real-time notification system that cut internal response times to user requests by 45%.
Optimized critical SQL queries and database indexes, reducing report generation times from 10s+ to <2s.

projects.name: Aurum Suite
projects.summary: A SaaS mining traceability platform for monitoring and managing gold processing across multiple sites.
projects.description: Backend system built from scratch to digitize and centralize operational data across the gold production lifecycle. Supports laboratory, weighing, plant operations, and multi-site tracking.
highlights: Architected and scaled a backend system with 200+ REST endpoints across multiple domains, supporting end-to-end mining operations.
Provisioned and managed Azure infrastructure with automated CI/CD pipelines.
Ensured end-to-end data traceability and consistency across the gold production lifecycle.

projects.name: Aurum Legacy - Colombian Mint
projects.summary: Electronic invoicing system with DIAN integration for Colombian Mint's operational management.
projects.description: Legacy full stack application supporting electronic invoicing, inventory management, and business reporting. Predecessor to Aurum Suite.
highlights: Engineered DIAN integration for Colombian electronic invoicing compliance.
Designed and deployed a real-time notification system for user communication.
Built Tableau dashboards for operational and business data analysis.
Owned data integrity and system performance under growing production load.

projects.name: ChronoPOS
projects.summary: POS invoicing system for small and medium businesses.
projects.description: Point-of-sale application designed to streamline invoicing, inventory control, and sales management for retail businesses.
highlights: Architected the backend with NestJS, Prisma, and PostgreSQL for POS invoicing and inventory management.
Delivered a production-ready invoicing system with product catalog and stock control.
Configured production deployment with Dokploy on Hostinger infrastructure.

projects.name: ChronoParking
projects.summary: Parking lot management system with entry/exit control and rate calculation.
projects.description: Application for managing parking lots, controlling vehicle entry and exit, automatic rate calculation, and operational reporting.
highlights: Designed the complete data model for vehicles, rate structures, and parking space allocation.
Built the backend API layer with NestJS, Prisma, and PostgreSQL.
Managed deployment and operational infrastructure with Dokploy.

projects.name: MIPC Admin
projects.summary: Service order management system for a tech support, networking, and security cameras company.
projects.description: Full web application for managing service orders, clients, and operations at MIPC Tecnología, a tech support, network installation, and security camera company in Medellín.
highlights: Solo-built the full application — NestJS backend and Next.js frontend — from architecture to deployment.
Designed the PostgreSQL data model for service orders, client management, and technician dispatch.
Deployed on-premise with Docker and PM2, managing the full infrastructure lifecycle.
